name.description: Name of the MCP server project

directory.description: Parent directory where the project will be created

dependencies.description: Optional additional dependencies to include in package.json

tools.description: Optional list of initial tool names to create empty tool directories for

remote.description: Optional GitHub repository URL to add as origin remote (e.g., git@github.com:user/repo.git)

register.description: Register the server in opencode.json (default: false)

path.description: Full path to the created project directory

files.description: List of files that were created

registered.description: Whether server was registered in opencode.json
